abstract.text: This is a standard feedback settings section. It can
be modified with the same modifiers as the screen.
This article describes the KeyboardKit feedback engine.
This namespace contains keyboard feedback-related types.
This type contains setting section views and builder
parameters that are used by the settings screen.
KeyboardKit helps you create fully customizable keyboard extensions, using Swift and SwiftUI.
This article links to the various KeyboardKit features.
